datasets.name: ds_census_current
queryLines: SELECT department, location_facility, total_arrivals, total_discharges, estimated_census, snapshot_at FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current ORDER BY department, location_facility

datasets.name: ds_census_ed_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS ed_census, SUM(total_arrivals) AS ed_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS ed_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current WHERE department = 'ED'

datasets.name: ds_census_icu_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS icu_census, SUM(total_arrivals) AS icu_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS icu_discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current WHERE department = 'ICU'

datasets.name: ds_census_total
queryLines: SELECT SUM(estimated_census) AS total_census FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_department_census_current

datasets.name: ds_ed_hourly
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift' ELSE 'Night Shift' END AS shift_type FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_icu_hourly
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift' ELSE 'Night Shift' END AS shift_type FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_hourly_all
queryLines: SELECT 'ED' AS department, event_hour, DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift' ELSE 'Night Shift' END AS shift_type FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census UNION ALL SELECT 'ICU' AS department, event_hour, DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift' ELSE 'Night Shift' END AS shift_type FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_cumulative
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS discharges, SUM(net_change) AS net_change, SUM(SUM(net_change)) OVER (ORDER BY event_hour) AS cumulative_census FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census GROUP BY event_hour ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_icu_cumulative
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, SUM(arrivals) AS arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS discharges, SUM(net_change) AS net_change, SUM(SUM(net_change)) OVER (ORDER BY event_hour) AS cumulative_census FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census GROUP BY event_hour ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_shift_comparison
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift (7a-6p)' ELSE 'Night Shift (7p-6a)' END AS shift, ROUND(AVG(arrivals), 2) AS avg_arrivals, ROUND(AVG(discharges), 2) AS avg_discharges, SUM(arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS total_discharges, COUNT(*) AS total_hours FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census GROUP BY shift ORDER BY shift

datasets.name: ds_icu_shift_comparison
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 18 THEN 'Day Shift (7a-6p)' ELSE 'Night Shift (7p-6a)' END AS shift, ROUND(AVG(arrivals), 2) AS avg_arrivals, ROUND(AVG(discharges), 2) AS avg_discharges, SUM(arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(discharges) AS total_discharges, COUNT(*) AS total_hours FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census GROUP BY shift ORDER BY shift

datasets.name: ds_weekend_weekday
queryLines: SELECT department, day_type, ROUND(AVG(avg_arrivals), 2) AS avg_hourly_arrivals, SUM(total_arr) AS total_arrivals FROM (SELECT 'ED' AS department, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, AVG(arrivals) AS avg_arrivals, SUM(arrivals) AS total_arr FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census GROUP BY is_weekend UNION ALL SELECT 'ICU', CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END, AVG(arrivals), SUM(arrivals) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census GROUP BY is_weekend) GROUP BY department, day_type ORDER BY department, day_type

datasets.name: ds_hourly_avg_pattern
queryLines: SELECT department, hour_of_day, ROUND(AVG(arrivals), 2) AS avg_arrivals, ROUND(AVG(discharges), 2) AS avg_discharges FROM (SELECT 'ED' AS department, hour_of_day, arrivals, discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_hourly_census UNION ALL SELECT 'ICU', hour_of_day, arrivals, discharges FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_hourly_census) GROUP BY department, hour_of_day ORDER BY department, hour_of_day

datasets.name: ds_daily_all
queryLines: SELECT 'ED' AS department, activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE), 1) AS avg_los_value, 'minutes' AS los_unit, peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary UNION ALL SELECT 'ICU', activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE), 1), 'hours', peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_ed_daily
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE), 1) AS avg_los_minutes, ROUND(CAST(median_los_minutes AS DOUBLE), 1) AS median_los_minutes, ROUND(CAST(max_los_minutes AS DOUBLE), 1) AS max_los_minutes, peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_icu_daily
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, total_encounters, total_arrivals, total_discharges, unique_patients, ROUND(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE), 1) AS avg_los_hours, ROUND(CAST(median_los_hours AS DOUBLE), 1) AS median_los_hours, ROUND(CAST(max_los_hours AS DOUBLE), 1) AS max_los_hours, peak_arrival_hour, unique_providers, beds_used FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_ed_daily_kpis
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_arrivals), 1) AS avg_daily_arrivals, ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_minutes, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS total_discharges, ROUND(AVG(unique_patients), 1) AS avg_unique_patients, COUNT(DISTINCT activity_date) AS total_days FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary

datasets.name: ds_icu_daily_kpis
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_arrivals), 1) AS avg_daily_arrivals, ROUND(AVG(CAST(avg_los_hours AS DOUBLE)), 1) AS avg_los_hours, SUM(total_arrivals) AS total_arrivals, SUM(total_discharges) AS total_discharges, ROUND(AVG(beds_used), 1) AS avg_beds_used, COUNT(DISTINCT activity_date) AS total_days FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_daily_summary

datasets.name: ds_ed_peak_hours
queryLines: SELECT peak_arrival_hour, COUNT(*) AS days_as_peak FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary WHERE peak_arrival_hour IS NOT NULL GROUP BY peak_arrival_hour ORDER BY peak_arrival_hour

datasets.name: ds_ed_los_distribution
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE) < 60 THEN '<1 hr' WHEN CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 60 AND 120 THEN '1-2 hrs' WHEN CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 121 AND 240 THEN '2-4 hrs' WHEN CAST(avg_los_minutes AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 241 AND 480 THEN '4-8 hrs' ELSE '>8 hrs' END AS los_bucket, COUNT(*) AS day_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_daily_summary WHERE avg_los_minutes IS NOT NULL GROUP BY los_bucket ORDER BY los_bucket

datasets.name: ds_combined_features
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, ed_arrivals, ed_discharges, ed_net_change, icu_arrivals, icu_discharges, icu_net_change, total_arrivals, total_discharges, ROUND(ed_to_icu_ratio, 2) AS ed_to_icu_ratio, net_system_pressure, hour_of_day, day_of_week, is_weekend, CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, ROUND(ed_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(icu_arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(ed_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS ed_discharges_rolling_24h, ROUND(icu_discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS icu_discharges_rolling_24h FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_combined_kpis
queryLines: SELECT net_system_pressure, ROUND(ed_to_icu_ratio, 2) AS ed_to_icu_ratio, total_arrivals, total_discharges, ed_arrivals, icu_arrivals FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour DESC LIMIT 1

datasets.name: ds_combined_data_points
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS data_points, ROUND(AVG(net_system_pressure), 2) AS avg_pressure, ROUND(AVG(ed_to_icu_ratio), 2) AS avg_ratio FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features

datasets.name: ds_combined_pressure_summary
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN net_system_pressure > 5 THEN 'High Pressure (>5)' WHEN net_system_pressure > 0 THEN 'Moderate (1-5)' WHEN net_system_pressure = 0 THEN 'Balanced (0)' ELSE 'Under Capacity (<0)' END AS pressure_level, COUNT(*) AS hours FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_combined_forecast_features GROUP BY pressure_level ORDER BY hours DESC

datasets.name: ds_ed_features
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, HOUR(event_hour) AS hour_of_day, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, ROUND(arrivals_rolling_6h, 1) AS arrivals_rolling_6h, ROUND(arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(arrivals_avg_24h, 1) AS arrivals_avg_24h, ROUND(discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS discharges_rolling_24h, cumulative_net_census, is_night_shift, is_holiday_window FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_ed_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_icu_features
queryLines: SELECT event_hour, DATE(event_hour) AS event_date, HOUR(event_hour) AS hour_of_day, location_facility, arrivals, discharges, net_change, ROUND(arrivals_rolling_6h, 1) AS arrivals_rolling_6h, ROUND(arrivals_rolling_24h, 1) AS arrivals_rolling_24h, ROUND(arrivals_avg_24h, 1) AS arrivals_avg_24h, ROUND(discharges_rolling_24h, 1) AS discharges_rolling_24h, cumulative_net_census, is_night_shift, is_holiday_window FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_icu_forecast_features ORDER BY event_hour

datasets.name: ds_data_freshness
queryLines: SELECT MAX(last_message_at) AS latest_message, MAX(processing_hour) AS latest_processing_hour, COUNT(*) AS total_metric_rows FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_msg_throughput
queryLines: SELECT processing_hour, DATE(processing_hour) AS processing_date, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique, COUNT(DISTINCT message_type) AS message_types, COUNT(DISTINCT sending_facility) AS facilities FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY processing_hour ORDER BY processing_hour

datasets.name: ds_msg_metrics
queryLines: SELECT processing_hour, DATE(processing_hour) AS processing_date, message_type, sending_facility, message_count, unique_messages, first_message_at, last_message_at FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics ORDER BY processing_hour DESC

datasets.name: ds_msg_by_type
queryLines: SELECT message_type, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique, COUNT(DISTINCT sending_facility) AS facilities, COUNT(DISTINCT processing_hour) AS active_hours FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY message_type ORDER BY total_messages DESC

datasets.name: ds_msg_by_facility
queryLines: SELECT sending_facility, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique, COUNT(DISTINCT message_type) AS message_types FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY sending_facility ORDER BY total_messages DESC

datasets.name: ds_msg_daily_volume
queryLines: SELECT DATE(processing_hour) AS processing_date, SUM(message_count) AS total_messages, SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics GROUP BY processing_date ORDER BY processing_date

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity
queryLines: SELECT activity_date, location_facility, patient_class_desc, unique_patients, encounter_count, unique_providers FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity ORDER BY activity_date

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity_summary
queryLines: SELECT patient_class_desc, SUM(encounter_count) AS total_encounters, SUM(unique_patients) AS total_patients, SUM(unique_providers) AS total_providers, ROUND(AVG(encounter_count), 1) AS avg_daily_encounters FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity GROUP BY patient_class_desc ORDER BY total_encounters DESC

datasets.name: ds_patient_activity_facility
queryLines: SELECT location_facility, SUM(encounter_count) AS total_encounters, SUM(unique_patients) AS total_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_activity GROUP BY location_facility ORDER BY total_encounters DESC

datasets.name: ds_encounters_by_class
queryLines: SELECT patient_class_desc, COUNT(*) AS encounter_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact GROUP BY patient_class_desc ORDER BY encounter_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_encounters_by_trigger
queryLines: SELECT trigger_event, CASE trigger_event WHEN 'A01' THEN 'Admit' WHEN 'A02' THEN 'Transfer' WHEN 'A03' THEN 'Discharge' WHEN 'A04' THEN 'Register' WHEN 'A08' THEN 'Update' WHEN 'A11' THEN 'Cancel Admit' WHEN 'A13' THEN 'Cancel Discharge' ELSE trigger_event END AS event_desc, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact GROUP BY trigger_event ORDER BY cnt DESC

datasets.name: ds_encounters_by_location
queryLines: SELECT location_point_of_care AS unit, source_system AS facility, COUNT(*) AS encounters FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact WHERE location_point_of_care IS NOT NULL GROUP BY unit, facility ORDER BY encounters DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_pipeline_funnel
queryLines: SELECT 'Raw Files' AS stage, 1 AS stage_order, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.bronze_hl7_raw UNION ALL SELECT 'Split Messages', 2, COUNT(*) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.bronze_hl7_split UNION ALL SELECT 'Parsed Messages', 3, COUNT(*) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.bronze_hl7_parsed UNION ALL SELECT 'MSH Segments', 4, COUNT(*) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.silver_msh UNION ALL SELECT 'PV1 Encounters', 5, COUNT(*) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.silver_pv1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Gold Encounters', 6, COUNT(*) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact ORDER BY stage_order

datasets.name: ds_total_messages_ops
queryLines: SELECT SUM(message_count) AS total_messages FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_total_unique_msgs
queryLines: SELECT SUM(unique_messages) AS total_unique FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_message_metrics

datasets.name: ds_total_encounters
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_encounters FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_patients_ops
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim

lines: Live department census, hourly arrivals & discharges, shift analysis. Use filters below to drill down.

frame.title: Average Arrivals by Hour of Day

lines: Daily summaries, LOS analytics, peak hours, ED vs ICU comparison. Use date and facility filters to drill down.
